name: Do I need a lawyer for my denied comp claim after falling at my job in Murray?
description: Yes if denied—insurers lowball; lawyers paid from settlement.[9]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my denied comp claim after falling at my job in Murray?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if denied—insurers lowball; lawyers paid from settlement.[9]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, especially if denied, as insurers fight claims; lawyers handle disputes free until win.[9] Utah offers Claims Resolution Conferences.[1] Key factors: Check accepted injury description; prove work link.[9][1] Gather records, witness statements.[1] Free consult clarifies rights.[9]
